field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '收款登记', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'receipt_flow_label', 'source_origin', 'source_kind', 'business_category_id', 'date_receipt', 'document_no']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'legacy_project_name', 'company_id', 'legacy_company_name', 'operation_strategy', 'partner_id', 'legacy_partner_name', 'contract_id', 'legacy_contract_no', 'payment_request_id']}, {'title': '收款事项', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_receipt_type', 'legacy_receipt_subtype', 'receipt_type', 'income_category', 'payment_method', 'bill_no', 'invoice_ref']}, {'title': '收款账户', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['receiving_account', 'receiving_account_name', 'receiving_account_no', 'receiving_bank_name', 'treasury_ledger_id']}, {'title': '金额与抵扣', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['amount', 'deducted_invoice_amount', 'deducted_tax_amount', 'settlement_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '责任余额', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['company_contractor_responsibility_state', 'company_contractor_arrival_unprocessed_amount', 'company_contractor_arrival_over_processed_amount', 'company_contractor_self_funding_balance', 'company_contractor_responsibility_notice']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'receipt_income_attachment_text_display', 'reject_reason']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'legacy_document_state_label', 'legacy_note', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'receipt_flow_label', 'sequence': 40, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_origin', 'sequence': 50, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'source_kind', 'sequence': 60, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 70, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'date_receipt', 'sequence': 80, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 120, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_company_name', 'sequence': 130, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'operation_strategy', 'sequence': 140, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 150, 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'legacy_partner_name', 'sequence': 160, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'contract_id', 'sequence': 170, 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'legacy_contract_no', 'sequence': 180, 'group_title': '项目与合同', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'payment_request_id', 'sequence': 190, 'group_title': '项目与合同'}, {'name': 'legacy_receipt_type', 'sequence': 200, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'legacy_receipt_subtype', 'sequence': 210, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'receipt_type', 'sequence': 220, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'income_category', 'sequence': 230, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'payment_method', 'sequence': 240, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'bill_no', 'sequence': 250, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'invoice_ref', 'sequence': 260, 'group_title': '收款事项'}, {'name': 'receiving_account', 'sequence': 270, 'group_title': '收款账户'}, {'name': 'receiving_account_name', 'sequence': 280, 'group_title': '收款账户'}, {'name': 'receiving_account_no', 'sequence': 290, 'group_title': '收款账户'}, {'name': 'receiving_bank_name', 'sequence': 300, 'group_title': '收款账户'}, {'name': 'treasury_ledger_id', 'sequence': 310, 'group_title': '收款账户', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'amount', 'sequence': 320, 'group_title': '金额与抵扣'}, {'name': 'deducted_invoice_amount', 'sequence': 330, 'group_title': '金额与抵扣'}, {'name': 'deducted_tax_amount', 'sequence': 340, 'group_title': '金额与抵扣'}, {'name': 'settlement_amount', 'sequence': 350, 'group_title': '金额与抵扣'}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 360, 'group_title': '金额与抵扣'}, {'name': 'company_contractor_responsibility_state', 'company_contractor_arrival_over_processed_amount', 'sequence': 390, 'group_title': '责任余额', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'company_contractor_self_funding_balance', 'sequence': 400, 'group_title': '责任余额', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'company_contractor_responsibility_notice', 'sequence': 410, 'group_title': '责任余额', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 420, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 430, 'group_title': '说明与附件'}, {'name': 'receipt_income_attachment_text_display', 'sequence': 440, 'group_title': '说明与附件', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'reject_reason', 'sequence': 450, 'group_title': '说明与附件', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_model', 'sequence': 460, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_table', 'sequence': 470, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 480, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state', 'sequence': 490, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state_label', 'sequence': 500, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_note', 'sequence': 510, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'creator_name', 'sequence': 520, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'created_time', 'sequence': 530, 'group_title': '来源追溯', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 540, 'group_title': '来源追溯'} ] } } } }
